name: SSL Certificate Renewal Automation
description: Automated SSL certificate renewal workflow that checks certificate expiry dates, requests renewal via the ACME protocol or certificate authority API, validates the new certificate, and deploys it to the target servers. Includes a verification step after deployment to confirm the new certificate is active. Failed renewals or deployments trigger an escalation ticket and urgent notification to the infrastructure team.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Certificate Manager
required_integrations.reason: Check certificate expiry and issue renewal requests via ACME or CA API

required_integrations.name: Ansible
required_integrations.reason: Deploy renewed certificates to target servers and reload services

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create tickets for failed renewals or deployments requiring manual intervention

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the infrastructure team of renewal status and any failures

config.description: Runs daily at 3 AM to scan for SSL certificates expiring within 14 days and initiate renewal

config.query: SELECT cert_id, domain, issuer, expiry_date, server_hosts, renewal_method, DATEDIFF(expiry_date, NOW()) AS days_remaining FROM ssl_certificates WHERE expiry_date <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND status = 'active' AND auto_renew = true ORDER BY expiry_date ASC
config.description: Find all active SSL certificates expiring within 14 days that are configured for auto-renewal
Check if there are any SSL certificates due for renewal
Iterate over each expiring certificate and submit a renewal request via the configured method
Check if all certificate renewal requests completed successfully
Deploy the renewed certificates to all target servers and reload affected services
Wait for services to reload with the new certificates before verification
Verify that the new certificates are active and properly served on each domain
Notify the infrastructure team that SSL certificate renewals and deployments completed successfully

parameters.summary: SSL Renewal Failures — {{loop_1.renewal_results | filter(status != 'success') | length}} certificate(s)

config.description: Create a critical incident ticket for the failed SSL certificate renewals
Send urgent notification about failed SSL certificate renewals

parameters.note: Daily SSL expiry scan completed at {{trigger_1.timestamp}}. No certificates expiring within 14 days. No renewals required.

config.description: Log that no certificates require renewal for audit trail
SSL certificate renewal automation workflow complete
